body.title: Igor silent on web after restart — channel not receiving output
body.result: register() missing from web/server.start() — one-line fix, a31f5104
body.description:
After Igor restart, the web interface shows no output from him. Igor is running but nothing appears on the web channel. Likely causes: channel post not firing on startup, IMAP route not re-established after restart, or web→channel bridge broken.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py (startup sequence), lab/claudecode/channel.py, possibly bus/router.py reconnect logic
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** diagnose and fix the startup→web-channel gap only; not a full channel rewrite
**Test plan:** restart Igor; verify a startup message appears on web within 30s; channel_read via MCP returns recent Igor output
